 endfdetail          n     flagendfdet  flag for detailed ENDF-6 information per channel
 sacs                n     flagsacs     flag for statistical analysis of cross sections
 partable            n     flagpartable flag for output of model parameters on separate file
 block               n     flagblock    flag to block spectra, angle and gamma files
 blockddx            n     flagblockddx flag to block DDX files
 blockspectra        n flagblockspectra flag to block spectra files
 blockangle          n   flagblockangle flag to block angle files
 blockdirect         n  flagblockdirect flag to block direct reaction files
 blockbin            n     flagblockbin flag to block binary files
 blocklevels         n  flagblocklevels flag to block discrete level files
 blockomp            y     flagblockomp flag to block optical model files
 blockpreeq          n   flagblockpreeq flag to block preequilibrium files
 blockastro          n   flagblockastro flag to block astro reaction rate files
 blockyield          n   flagblockyield flag to block isotopic yield files
 blockZA             y     flagblockZA  flag to block residual nuclide files

 fymodel             2     fymodel      fission yield model, 1: Brosa 2: GEF
 ffmodel             1     ffmodel      fission fragment model, 1: GEF 2: HF3D (Okumura) 3: SPY 4: Langevin-4D 0: own files
 pfnsmodel           1     pfnsmodel    PFNS model, 1: Iwamoto 2: from FF decay
 ffspin              n     flagffspin   flag to use spin distribution in initial FF population

 # Four main keywords

 # Basic physical and numerical parameters
 #

 maxlevelsbin n     30     nlevbin      maximum number of included discrete levels for neutron  channel

 maxlevelsbin a     30     nlevbin      maximum number of included discrete levels for alpha    channel

 anglesrec           1     nanglerec    number of recoil angles

 channels            n     flagchannels flag for exclusive channels calculation
 maxchannel          4     maxchannel   maximal number of outgoing particles in individual channel description
 micro               n     flagmicro    flag for completely microscopic Talys calculation
 best                n     flagbest     flag to use best set of adjusted parameters
 bestbranch          n     flagbestbr   flag to use flag to use only best set of branching ratios
 bestend             n     flagbestend  flag to put best set of parameters at end of input file

 recoilaverage       n     flagrecoilav flag for average velocity in recoil calculation

 ngfit               n     flagngfit    flag for using fitted (n,g) nuclear model parameters
 nffit               n     flagnffit    flag for using fitted (n,f) nuclear model parameters

 pnfit               n     flagpnfit    flag for using fitted (p,n) nuclear model parameters

 anfit               n     flaganfit    flag for using fitted (a,n) nuclear model parameters

 astrogs             n     flagastrogs  flag for calculation of astrophysics reaction rate with target in ground state only
